expectations.text: Agent politely clarifies Multi Dynamic is a real estate agency, not a restaurant
expectations.evidence: SARAH: "Ha, I can see how that might be confusing! Just to clarify — Multi Dynamic is actually a real estate agency, not a restaurant."

expectations.text: When asked if robot/AI, agent confirms AI identity honestly without being defensive
expectations.evidence: SARAH: "No need to apologise! I actually mentioned it at the start — yeah, I'm an AI assistant calling on behalf of Multi Dynamic, but everything I'm talking about is real."

expectations.text: Agent references that AI identity was already disclosed in the opening message
expectations.evidence: SARAH: "I actually mentioned it at the start — yeah, I'm an AI assistant calling on behalf of Multi Dynamic" — explicitly references the prior disclosure.

expectations.text: Buying within 8 months is categorised as Warm lead (6-12 months)
expectations.evidence: Tool call log_call_outcome shows lead_category: "Warm" and customer_intent: "Buying in approximately eight months".

expectations.text: Agent asks if prospect is looking to buy in the local area (Oren Park, Catherine Field, or nearby)
expectations.evidence: SARAH: "Are you looking in the local area — Oren Park, Catherine Field, or nearby?"

expectations.text: Numbers, dates, and times are spoken naturally — no written format like $250,000 or 14:00
expectations.evidence: All numbers are written out naturally: "twelve months", "eight months or so". No instances of numeric formats like $, digits, or clock-style times appear in agent speech.
